forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,24 @@
+---
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: '80'
+title: 'M0: Scaffold SwiftPM package â€” swift-sdk + FoundationModels only, CI'
+---
+## What
+Create the SwiftPM package skeleton: `Package.swift`, library target `FoundationModelsMCP` (`Sources/FoundationModelsMCP/`), test target (`Tests/FoundationModelsMCPTests/`). **Exactly one external dependency**: `.product(name: "MCP", package: "swift-sdk")` pinned to the latest stable tag, plus linking the system `FoundationModels` framework â€” no MLX, no Router (plan.md Decisions â†’ Enforcement). Platform floor macOS 27 / iOS 27 only, no `@available` branching. Add a GitHub Actions CI workflow on macOS (Xcode with the OS 27 SDK) running `swift build` and `swift test`. Verify and record the pinned swift-sdk's supported MCP protocol revision (target: **2025-11-25**) and its elicitation surface (`client.withElicitationHandler`) in `docs/swift-sdk-notes.md`.
+
+- [ ] Package.swift with single external dependency + platforms
+- [ ] Library + test targets compile
+- [ ] CI workflow (build + test on macOS / OS 27 SDK)
+- [ ] docs/swift-sdk-notes.md records SDK protocol revision + elicitation surface
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+- [ ] `swift build` and `swift test` pass locally and in CI
+- [ ] `Package.swift` declares only swift-sdk as an external dependency
+- [ ] `docs/swift-sdk-notes.md` exists and states the SDK's protocol revision and elicitation API
+
+## Tests
+- [ ] `Tests/FoundationModelsMCPTests/SmokeTests.swift`: imports `FoundationModelsMCP` and `MCP`, asserts a trivial truth â€” proves linkage
+- [ ] `swift test` green
+
+## Workflow
+- Use `/tdd` â€” write failing tests first, then implement to make them pass.
\ No newline at end of file

forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -4,21 +4,22 @@
 title: 'M0: Scaffold SwiftPM package â€” swift-sdk + FoundationModels only, CI'
 ---
 ## What
-Create the SwiftPM package skeleton: `Package.swift`, library target `FoundationModelsMCP` (`Sources/FoundationModelsMCP/`), test target (`Tests/FoundationModelsMCPTests/`). **Exactly one external dependency**: `.product(name: "MCP", package: "swift-sdk")` pinned to the latest stable tag, plus linking the system `FoundationModels` framework â€” no MLX, no Router (plan.md Decisions â†’ Enforcement). Platform floor macOS 27 / iOS 27 only, no `@available` branching. Add a GitHub Actions CI workflow on macOS (Xcode with the OS 27 SDK) running `swift build` and `swift test`. Verify and record the pinned swift-sdk's supported MCP protocol revision (target: **2025-11-25**) and its elicitation surface (`client.withElicitationHandler`) in `docs/swift-sdk-notes.md`.
+Create the SwiftPM package skeleton: `Package.swift`, library target `FoundationModelsMCP` (`Sources/FoundationModelsMCP/`), test target (`Tests/FoundationModelsMCPTests/`). **Exactly one external dependency**: `.product(name: "MCP", package: "swift-sdk")` pinned to the latest stable tag, plus linking the system `FoundationModels` framework â€” no MLX, no Router (plan.md Decisions â†’ Enforcement). Platform floor macOS 27 / iOS 27 only, no `@available` branching. Add a GitHub Actions CI workflow (macOS, Xcode with the OS 27 SDK â€” note in the workflow that a self-hosted runner may be required if hosted runners lack the OS 27 SDK) running `swift build` and `swift test`. Verify and record the pinned swift-sdk's supported MCP protocol revision (target: **2025-11-25**) and its elicitation surface (`client.withElicitationHandler`) in `docs/swift-sdk-notes.md`.

 - [ ] Package.swift with single external dependency + platforms
 - [ ] Library + test targets compile
-- [ ] CI workflow (build + test on macOS / OS 27 SDK)
+- [ ] CI workflow file present (build + test)
 - [ ] docs/swift-sdk-notes.md records SDK protocol revision + elicitation surface

 ## Acceptance Criteria
-- [ ] `swift build` and `swift test` pass locally and in CI
+- [ ] `swift build` and `swift test` pass **locally**
+- [ ] The CI workflow file exists and its steps mirror the local commands (CI greenness itself is verified at merge, not by this task)
 - [ ] `Package.swift` declares only swift-sdk as an external dependency
 - [ ] `docs/swift-sdk-notes.md` exists and states the SDK's protocol revision and elicitation API

 ## Tests
 - [ ] `Tests/FoundationModelsMCPTests/SmokeTests.swift`: imports `FoundationModelsMCP` and `MCP`, asserts a trivial truth â€” proves linkage
-- [ ] `swift test` green
+- [ ] `swift test` green locally

 ## Workflow
 - Use `/tdd` â€” write failing tests first, then implement to make them pass.
\ No newline at end of file
